text.tspan: PID Namespace Visibility in Container Isolation

div.p: The NSpid field represents the process identifier translated into each successive PID namespace in the hierarchy.

tr.td: PID as seen by the process itself.
PID as seen by the parent namespace.

div.p: Source: /proc/self/status text Name: nginx State: S (sleeping) Tgid: 1 Ngid: 0 Pid: 1 PPid: 0 ... NSpid: 1 12345

blockquote.p: Logic: Kernel iterates from ns->level (1) up to current_ns->level (1). Result: [1, 12345]

div.p: Source: /proc/12345/status text Name: nginx State: S (sleeping) Tgid: 12345 Ngid: 0 Pid: 12345 PPid: 12340 ... NSpid: 12345

blockquote.p: Logic: From host context, the current process is in Level 0. Loop only prints the global PID.

g.text: static void task_nspid(struct seq_file *m, struct task_struct *task)

text.tspan: /* i = starting level of the target task
looping up to the level of the reader (current) */

looping up to the level of the reader (current) */
